name: Ashoka
summary: It should be framed conservatively because traditional gynecologic use is much stronger than modern evidence.
description: It should be framed conservatively because traditional gynecologic use is much stronger than modern evidence.
contraindications: pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance because ashoka has traditional uterine-stimulant activity and insufficient safety data exists
diabetes medication because ashoka has documented hypoglycemic activity and may have an additive blood-glucose-lowering effect
hormone replacement therapy or hormonal contraceptives because ashoka has shown estrogenic activity in research and may alter hormone levels

sources.title: Social entrepreneurship in obesity prevention: A scoping review
The gender responsiveness of social entrepreneurship in health - A review of initiatives by Ashoka fellows
